[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up view of large, black text reading “sayang” on a white background.

The main visual focus is the word “sayang,” with only the lower portion fully visible due to the cropped framing.

The setting appears to be a plain digital or printed graphic background with no physical environment; the background is solid white and the text is centered toward the top of the frame. The time of day and weather are not applicable.

Visually, the text is in a lowercase sans-serif style, colored black, with smooth edges and generous spacing. The camera view is tightly cropped, cutting off part of the top letters and leaving the word “sayang” clearly readable.

Visible Text:
sayang

Practical Summary:
This image is a cropped close-up showing the word “sayang” in large black lowercase letters. The rest of the image is a plain white background with no additional elements.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

sayang

# Structured Version

- sayang

# Notes

None.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Tentu, saya akan menganalisis gambar tersebut.

Gambar tersebut berisi teks tunggal "sayang" yang ditulis dalam huruf kapital tebal berwarna hitam di atas latar belakang putih. Kata ini adalah kata dalam bahasa Indonesia yang memiliki arti "sayang" atau "cinta". Tidak ada elemen visual lain dalam gambar ini.

Berikut adalah hasil analisisnya dalam format JSON:
```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
